title: Revert mis-merged reverts of vendor.conf
body:
PR #440 reverted the vendor.conf edits of #426.  This passed CI because the corresponding vendor/* subpackages were not modified.

Restore the `vendor.conf` changes, and re-run full `(vndr)` to ensure the two are consistent again.

comments.body:
LGTM
and happy green lights, looks like this can be merged.
